challenge.npc_text: Sure. Standard rules. 5 minutes. No substitutes. No pausing. And definitely no noodling. No excuses.

choices.text: Let's go. I've been reading up.

lose.npc_text: Tactically, that was a masterclass in what not to do. You pressed too high, dribbled into the box, and ran the same corner routine until it stopped being a mistake and started being a choice. I have notes. Do you want the notes?

choices.text: I need to think about this.

pre_win.npc_text: Wait. You're... playing differently. You held the line, you pressed at 70%, you didn't panic at all. What happened to you?

choices.text: I've been thinking about the game differently.

win_book.npc_text: 'Winning Ugly'? You read 'Winning Ugly'? That book is... okay that's actually a legitimate psychological framework. I — fine. You won. The better tactician won today. I need to sit with this.

win_vague.npc_text: You actually won. I don't know what I just watched but it was structured. Like you had a plan and stuck to it. I respect that more than I want to admit.

post_win.npc_text: Look — you won fair. We are going to step out for a bit. The lab's yours. Don't touch the compile terminal. And if I would be you, I would not touch the specimen...
